title: Identify the CI/CD Tool
description:
## Pick the Right Category

The DevOps toolbox is crowded and tools are easy to mix up. Which of the following is a **CI/CD platform** — a tool whose primary job is to build, test and deploy your code via pipelines?

options.text: **GitHub Actions** — runs pipelines to build, test and deploy code

explanation: **GitHub Actions** is a CI/CD platform: you define workflows that automatically build, test and deploy on events like pushes and pull requests (alongside Jenkins, GitLab CI and CircleCI). The others belong to different categories: **Terraform** is Infrastructure as Code (provisioning), **Ansible** is configuration management, and **Prometheus** is a monitoring/metrics system. They are often used *together with* CI/CD but are not pipeline runners themselves.

hints.title: Match tool to job
hints.body: Ask 'what is this tool's main verb?' Build/test/deploy on commit = CI/CD. Provision infra = IaC. Configure servers = config management. Collect metrics = monitoring.
